Package i5.cb.graph.diagram

Class DiagramClassHashtableEntry

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.graph.diagram.DiagramClassHashtableEntry

  • public class DiagramClassHashtableEntry
extends java.lang.Object
    These entries contain the userobject specific items of a DiagramObject

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected DiagramNode diagramNode
      The DiagramNode associated with a certain userObject
      protected java.awt.Color edgeColor
      The color of the edgeline associated with a certain userObject (used only if the userobject is represented by a DiagramEdge).

      protected java.awt.Shape edgeHeadShape

      The information document assocated with a certain userobject
